title: What would the Angels
wikitext:
[]: What would the Angels?(Spoilers,just to be safe)             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Tue Jan 05, 2010 11:07 pm Okay.I got a question.Let's say that the angel's from the TV series were included into the Rebuild series.The ones that were left out like Gaghiel,Israfel,etc.What changes do you think they would go under.Assuming some do get changed.Like would they gain new powers or what they would look like,etc.I cant really think of anything new for them,really.How about you guys?What changes do you think they would go under if they were included into the Rebuild series?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jan 06, 2010 1:18 am Matarael: laser eyes/vision to make the poor little guy badass. All I can really think of at the moment.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Wed Jan 06, 2010 1:32 am Iruel could have taken over part of the MAGI System then combined with a few of the Simulation Bodies. The conglomerated Simulation Bodies then make it to the remains of the abandoned positron rifle and fuses with it. The Angel nano-swarm forms a collective S2 and the rifle has a functional power source again. With the MAGI under seige and a giant deformed meat puppet with a high powered weapon assulting NERV headquarters, they are in some deep shit. Iruel then gets beaten the old way like in the series. If the screen time could be allowed to cram another Angel in, it could work. The positron rifle could be ommited though.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jan 06, 2010 2:28 am That actually sounds pretty bad ass.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Jan 06, 2010 4:38 am Leliel, expanding into a tesseract that begins ripping up the surrounding city and swallowing it like a blackhole, warping timespace around it. It gets beaten with the involvement of a temporal loop, wherein the Bridge Bunnies read some data extracted from Leliel's wavelengths. It turns out to have an encrypted message from the NERV of the future, saying they received data on how to defeat Leliel from the Nerv of the future. Ritsuko realizes the implications, and has the Evangelions defeat Leliel while sending the message back through Leliel, sending it into the past. Information with no origin. Misato muses that it'd be best not to think about what just happened.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Wed Jan 06, 2010 10:58 am AuraTwilight wrote: Leliel, expanding into a tesseract that begins ripping up the surrounding city and swallowing it like a blackhole, warping timespace around it. It gets beaten with the involvement of a temporal loop, wherein the Bridge Bunnies read some data extracted from Leliel's wavelengths. It turns out to have an encrypted message from the NERV of the future, saying they received data on how to defeat Leliel from the Nerv of the future. Ritsuko realizes the implications, and has the Evangelions defeat Leliel while sending the message back through Leliel, sending it into the past. Information with no origin. Misato muses that it'd be best not to think about what just happened.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Jan 06, 2010 1:42 pm Aura wins. I think the only thing I would add would have leliel's shadow more psychedelic with moving black and white stripes.

[]:             Quote Post by itrytofight » Wed Jan 06, 2010 8:26 pm Aura's version of Leliel is awesome. Adds a bit more mind fuck to the story. Any ideas for Arael? Instead of it mind raping one target, why not have it hit multiple targets (or all of them, targets being eva pilots) for angst and back story? Maybe have the "lets throw the Spear of Longinus at it" solution back fire. What do you guys think?

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Thu Jan 07, 2010 12:09 am Aura, you have won all my internets. That being said, I hereby leave my account on Evageeks, my facebook, and my webcomic XD (jk on that last sentence though)

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Jan 07, 2010 1:54 am Any ideas for Arael? Instead of it mind raping one target, why not have it hit multiple targets (or all of them, targets being eva pilots) for angst and back story? Maybe have the "lets throw the Spear of Longinus at it" solution back fire.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Jan 07, 2010 9:43 am mind rape orgy? no way that would get past the censors

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Thu Jan 07, 2010 6:29 pm No love for dear old Sandy?

[]:             Quote Post by itrytofight » Thu Jan 07, 2010 7:25 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Any ideas for Arael? Instead of it mind raping one target, why not have it hit multiple targets (or all of them, targets being eva pilots) for angst and back story? Maybe have the "lets throw the Spear of Longinus at it" solution back fire.

[]:             Quote Post by Natsuka_Chie » Thu Jan 07, 2010 8:03 pm Gaghiel appearing (smaller than in NGE) in the Aquarium that Shinji, Asuka, Rei, etc visited. He then proceeds to eat all the animals in there (NO LILITH BASED LIVE FORM IS ALLOWED!!) and grows. He then escapes to the sea. Asuka and Rei must pursue and kill him, in the ocean (Shinji can't swim). Of course the EVAs have a special underwater suit (large version of Asuka test-suit). They kill him by shooting him with a giant fishing speargun with a N2 bomb glued to the spear. Just having fun imagining the EVAs in a test plugsuit....

[]:             Quote Post by Starasp » Thu Jan 07, 2010 8:45 pm Sammaeloo wrote: Iruel could have taken over part of the MAGI System then combined with a few of the Simulation Bodies. The conglomerated Simulation Bodies then make it to the remains of the abandoned positron rifle and fuses with it. The Angel nano-swarm forms a collective S2 and the rifle has a functional power source again. With the MAGI under seige and a giant deformed meat puppet with a high powered weapon assulting NERV headquarters, they are in some deep shit. Iruel then gets beaten the old way like in the series. If the screen time could be allowed to cram another Angel in, it could work. The positron rifle could be ommited though.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Thu Jan 07, 2010 9:07 pm Kaworu. I think that the way he made his Angel Intro was just fine but it could have had some black glowing wings, jet black demon eyes and a different AT field (something like Ramiel's in NGE) I also think it would have been good if when he takes over Eva unit 02, he controls it like that one umm.....Fox guy from Bleach ( his name slips my mind ) when he's in Bankai. I think that would be a good change indeed.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Jan 07, 2010 9:44 pm As for Sandy (otherwise Sandalphon), the angel is said to have been the prophet Elijah before being transfigured into angel status (see http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sandalphon) so maybe he parades around in human form before reavealing himself... yeah, kinda cheap though.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Thu Jan 07, 2010 9:47 pm Lol.You guys got some great imaginations going on.

[]:             Quote Post by Starasp » Thu Jan 07, 2010 10:45 pm AuraTwilight wrote: As for Sandy (otherwise Sandalphon), the angel is said to have been the prophet Elijah before being transfigured into angel status (see http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sandalphon) so maybe he parades around in human form before reavealing himself... yeah, kinda cheap though.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Jan 08, 2010 4:52 am Yea, I have a sick imagination when it comes to horrible monsters and terrible abominations.
